creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is the first such report ever.  Something must be different on
your systems than on others. 

Any idea what that might be?

(The error is about the compiler not knowing the -fcx-fortran-rules
command-line option, which is surprising given that we are using the
just built compiler to build Fortran here.  Do you have anything
special set somewhere?)
